query: SELECT ticker, currentPrice, ytdStartPrice, ytdPerformance, (CAST(currentPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / CAST(ytdStartPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - 1) * 100 as calculated_perf FROM stocks WHERE ticker IN (SELECT ticker FROM historicalPrices GROUP BY ticker) ORDER BY ABS((CAST(currentPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / CAST(ytdStartPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - 1) * 100 - CAST(ytdPerformance AS DECIMAL(10,2))) DESC LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT ticker, currentPrice, ytdStartPrice, ytdPerformance, (CAST(currentPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / CAST(ytdStartPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - 1) * 100 as calculated_perf FROM stocks WHERE ticker IN (SELECT ticker FROM historicalPrices GROUP BY ticker) ORDER BY ABS((CAST(currentPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / CAST(ytdStartPrice AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - 1) * 100 - CAST(ytdPerformance AS DECIMAL(10,2))) DESC LIMIT 10
